docs.title: Projects
docs.text: This section documents the main projects in the Manitec Projects KB.

docs.title: Project List
docs.text:
• Banjoshire Chat — Social chat app similar to Discord, built with TypeScript.
  • Chatbot — AI assistant project built with TypeScript.
  • Mailserver — Custom Zoho Mail360 client built in Python.
  • Manitec Apps — Personal app store built in Python.
  • Ebbinor — Voxel game project built on the Minetest engine.
  • Joe's Faves — Main web project with app ecosystem and monetization.

docs.title: Ebbinor
docs.text: Ebbinor is a voxel game project built on the Minetest open-source engine, written in C++.

docs.title: Status
docs.text:
• Status: Active
  • Language: C++
  • Engine: Minetest (voxel game engine)

docs.title: Tools Used
docs.text: Tool Purpose Cloudflare DNS & CDN Namecheap Domain management NightCafe AI art / texture generation

docs.title: Links
docs.text:
• GitHub: Manitec/Ebbinor
  • Minetest engine: minetest.net

docs.title: Notes
docs.text: Built on the Minetest voxel engine (LGPL v2.1+). Supports easy modding, game creation, Docker deployment, and cross-platform builds (Linux, Windows, macOS).

docs.title: Joe's Faves
docs.text: Joe's Faves is the main Manitec web project — a curated site with an app ecosystem, public project listings, and monetization through Supersonic.

docs.title: Status
docs.text:
• Status: Active
  • Platform: Web
  • Main domain: joesfaves.com

docs.title: Tools Used
docs.text: Tool Purpose Vercel Frontend deployment Firebase Backend & auth DashNex App & content management Cloudflare DNS & CDN Namecheap Domain registration Supersonic Ad monetization NightCafe AI art & creative assets

docs.title: Links
docs.text: Resource URL Main Site joesfaves.com Apps apps.joesfaves.com Projects joesfaves.com/my-projects

docs.title: Notes
docs.text: Monetized via Supersonic. Creative assets generated through NightCafe. App ecosystem managed through DashNex dashboard.
